purpose: Resend transactional email (signup verification + password reset)

records.name: resend._domainkey
records.purpose: DKIM signing key — Resend signs outgoing mail; receivers verify the signature against this key

records.name: send
records.purpose: Bounce/complaint feedback loop for Amazon SES (Resend's underlying relay in us-east-1)

records.name: send
records.purpose: SPF — authorizes Amazon SES to send mail on behalf of send.ifsjournal.me
